---
name: New rule or skill
about: Propose a new rule, or a new skill — must come with a failing baseline
title: "[rule] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

Rules here earn their place by flipping a real failure, not by sounding wise. Please read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) — a proposal without a failing baseline will be asked to add one first.

**The rule/skill you're proposing:**

**The failure it prevents — have you seen the target model do it?**
- [ ] Yes, I have a transcript (paste below)
- [ ] No, this is predicted (that's allowed, but it ships labeled as predicted, not observed)

**Baseline transcript (the model failing without the rule):**

```
<paste>
```

**Why an existing skill doesn't already cover this:**

**Draft rule + rationalizations-table row:**
| Thought | Reality |
|---|---|
| "<the excuse>" | "<the rebuttal>" |
